title: HTI Peppa Pig Keys | Electronic Toy Car Keys Pretend Play for Little Boys & Girls
features: AUTHENTIC SOUNDS - The Peppa Pig Keys feature 3 easy-to-press buttons which unlock authentic and realistic sounds, just like a real car! Including car locking and unlocking along with car revving and driving, little boys and girls will love pretending to open real life cars!

CHILD FRIENDLY & SAFE - Made from high-quality plastic and with smooth edges, the Peppa Pig keys are safe for young children to be played with all day long. Bright and colourful, the keys are certain to keep children entertained for hours as they open their cars with the interactive buttons.
IT'S DRIVE TIME! - Great for portability, the Peppa Pig free-swinging keys can be taken outdoors and on any journey! Great for little hands and easy to grip, it's time to hit the road and drive!

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Contains 1x set of Peppa Pig toy keys. Officially licensed by Peppa Pig. Battery operated: requires batteries (2x 1.5V AG13/LR44). Not suitable for children under age of 3. Approx. dimensions: H15cm x L5cm x W2cm.

CE MARKED UK SELLER SAFE TO PLAY. It's made from safe, non-toxic ingredients. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standard to ensure the safety of your children; please be careful when comparing with others.
description: The HTI Peppa Pig keys have 3 easy-to-press buttons which unlock authentic and realistic sounds, just like a real car! Including car locking and unlocking along with car revving and driving, little boys and girls will love pretending to open real life cars! Made from high-quality plastic and with smooth edges, The Peppa Pig keys are safe for young children to be played with all day long. Bright and colourful, the keys are certain to keep children entertained for hours as they open their cars with the interactive buttons.
